description: Mapeo de ilustraciones para cada carta/familia. Pensado para reemplazo progresivo — se puede empezar con 7 imágenes (una por familia) y luego expandir a una por carta si se desea.

brown.label: Materia
brown.prompt_keywords: indigenous woodcutters, Patagonian forest, hands shaping clay, axes, earth tones

gray.label: Oficio
gray.prompt_keywords: Mapuche loom, woman weaving, silver jewelry being hammered, basket weaving

blue.label: Rehue
blue.prompt_keywords: rehue carved wooden altar, ceremony by a patagonian lake, machi praying, kultrun drum

green.label: Machi
green.prompt_keywords: lawentuchefe herbalist gathering medicinal plants, night sky stars, southern cross

yellow.label: Trueque
yellow.prompt_keywords: caravan crossing patagonian steppe, horses loaded with goods, wind-blown flags, mountains

red.label: Malón
red.prompt_keywords: indigenous warriors on horseback with lances and oval shields, dust trail, steppe

purple.label: Lof
purple.prompt_keywords: family gathering inside a ruka, elder telling stories by the fire, children listening

nukemapu.prompt_keywords: large Mapuche ruka with smoke, carved rehue in front, snow-capped mountains behind, figures in geometric ponchos

aonikenk.prompt_keywords: guanaco-leather toldos on patagonian steppe, horses, tall figures with painted capes

selknam.prompt_keywords: Selknam Hain ceremony, men painted white/red/black, subantarctic forest, central bonfire

kaweskar.prompt_keywords: long canoes in glacier channels, figures in otter-skin capes, icy water

yamana.prompt_keywords: conical branch ruka by the water, fire, carved canoe, lenga forest

gununa.prompt_keywords: coastal patagonian camp, wind, tall beacon fire, northern patagonia cliffs

rankul.prompt_keywords: pampa toldos, horses, figures weaving with boleadoras hanging nearby

table_background.prompt_keywords: aged patagonian leather texture with subtle Mapuche geometric pattern embossed, warm brown and cream, 4k seamless
table_background.notes: Reemplaza la textura de madera actual. Mantener resolución >= 2048x2048 para que no se vea pixelado en mesas grandes.

per_card_illustrations.description: Opcional, fase 2: ilustración individual por carta.
per_card_illustrations.example: card-a2_quarry_3.png → ilustración específica de Cantera Mayor
per_card_illustrations.integration_hint: En CardView.tsx: const img = `/assets/cards/${card.id}.png`; con fallback a COLOR_IMG[card.color]
